INSTITUTION INNOVATION COUNCIL (IIC)
Institution Innovation Council is a Ministry of Education initiative to nurture the innovative spirit in students. IIC of Sri Eshwar conducts routine events, seminars and workshops, inline with the MOE Innovation Cell requirements to ensure that our students are well aligned with the latest trends that the entire nation is marching setting for itself as goals and marching towards in unison.
